errors: ["Has Osteoporotic Fracture" expression in ELM incorrectly checks for non-null clinicalStatus instead of simply checking existence of any fracture diagnosis. The CPG requires exclusion for any history of osteoporotic fractures regardless of active status, but the ELM implementation adds an unnecessary clinicalStatus filter that may exclude fewer patients than intended by the CPG requirements.]
[Minimum Age check uses 25 years instead of 18 years as required by CPG. EncounterLookBack interval uses 6 months instead of 12 months as specified in CPG requirements.]
["Age range upper limit in ELM is 80 years, but CPG specifies 85 years"]

[The HbA1c Laboratory Test numeric threshold in ELM uses 9 g% instead of the required 6.5% specified in the CPG. Additionally, the unit "g%" is incorrect - the CPG specifies "%" as the unit for HbA1c results.]

[The Rationale in the ELM is missing the second part of the USPSTF recommendation about the 5-year option with hrHPV testing in combination with cytology for women aged 30-65 years. The ELM's Rationale only includes the 3-year Pap smear recommendation, while the CPG explicitly states both options.]

[The ELM implementation does not include checks for the required 20 pack-year smoking history or the 15-year quit window for former smokers. The "Has Smoking History" expression only checks for the presence of a tobacco user condition with active status, but lacks validation of pack-years and quit duration. The age (50-80) and recent LDCT exclusion (1-year) criteria are correctly implemented.]

[Age thresholds in ELM (60-75) do not match CPG requirements (45-75); time interval for recent screening in ELM is 2 years instead of 1 year as specified in CPG; Rationale output is always null in ELM, but CPG requires specific rationale text when InPopulation=true]

[The ELM specifies a 6-month interval for recent anxiety screening, but the CPG requires a 1-year interval. Additionally, the ELM's "Rationale" output is always null, whereas the CPG specifies a non-null rationale when screening is needed.]

[1. The "In Demographic" expression checks for age >= 30 years instead of the required 15-65 years range. 2. The age range in CPG (15-65) is not fully implemented in ELM - only lower bound (>=30) is present, missing upper bound (<=65). 3. The Rationale field in ELM is always set to null, but CPG requires specific rationale text when InPopulation=true. 4. The "In Demographic" expression uses a fixed value of 30 instead of the required 15.]

[BMI threshold in ELM is 35 kg/m² instead of 25 kg/m² as required by CPG; recent glucose test interval in ELM is 1 year instead of 3 years as specified; Rationale output is always null in ELM but should contain text when InPopulation=true]

[The ELM implementation incorrectly uses a 3-month interval for recent depression screening (in "Has Recent Adult Depression Screening" and "Has Recent Adolescent Depression Screening") instead of the required 1-year interval specified in the CPG. The logical structure correctly implements AND/OR/NOT operators and value set references, but the time interval mismatch violates the CPG requirements.]
["In the ELM, the 'In Demographic' expression checks for age >=75 years, but the CPG requires age >=65 years. This numeric value does not match the CPG requirement exactly."]
["In the 'In Demographic' expression, the age threshold is set to 25 years instead of the required 18 years as specified in the CPG inclusion criteria."]

["The ELM implementation incorrectly checks for DEXA scans in the past 6 months instead of the required 2 years as specified in the CPG. The 'Has Recent DEXA Scan' expression uses an interval of 6 months, but the CPG requires checking for scans within the past 2 years."]
["In Demographic" expression in ELM uses age >= 55 years instead of the required 65 years per CPG requirements. The lower age bound should be 65, but is incorrectly set to 55 in the ELM JSON.]

[The ELM implementation does not correctly combine the inclusion criteria. The "Needs Tobacco Use Screening" expression only references "In Demographic" (age >=18) but does not include the required check for absence of recent tobacco screening (past 1 year). The logical AND between age criteria and no recent screening is missing. The "Has Recent Tobacco Screening" expression exists but is not used in the final "InPopulation" calculation. The "Needs Tobacco Use Screening" expression should be a logical AND of "In Demographic" and NOT "Has Recent Tobacco Screening", but this is not implemented.]

[The "Colonoscopy" expression in the ELM uses a "Greater" operator (count > 0) to check for existing procedures, but the CPG requires "count of procedures in past 1 month = 0" for inclusion. This inverts the logic - the ELM would recommend screening when a colonoscopy exists (contrary to CPG), and withhold recommendations when no colonoscopy exists (as required by CPG). The operator should be "Equal" with value 0 instead of "Greater" with value 0.]

["Needs Falls Prevention Screening" expression incorrectly combines "In Demographic" AND "Has Recent Falls Assessment" when it should be "In Demographic" AND NOT "Has Recent Falls Assessment". The logic is inverted - screening is needed when there is NO recent assessment, but the ELM currently indicates screening is needed when there IS a recent assessment.]

["The ELM incorrectly uses a logical AND instead of OR for exclusion criteria. The CPG requires exclusion if either Bipolar Disorder OR Depression diagnosis is present, but the ELM checks for both diagnoses simultaneously (NOT (Has Bipolar AND Has Depression)). This would fail to exclude patients with only one of the diagnoses."]

["MeetsExclusionCriteria in ELM uses AND instead of or for combining Connective Tissue Disorders and Amiodarone exclusions. The CPG requires ANY exclusion criterion (OR logic) to trigger exclusion, but the ELM implements AND which would only exclude patients meeting both criteria simultaneously."]
["Value set ID for 'Fall Risk Assessment' in ELM (2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.564) does not match CPG requirement (2.16.840.1.113883.3.464.1003.118.12.1028)"]
["Value set ID for 'Alcohol Use Screening' in ELM (2.16.840.1.113883.3.526.3.1278) does not match CPG requirement (2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1542)"]
